raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tannis Deenâs/ kad tas
Rehniasch Aâswerus us fawn
Walstibas Krehtsu tehdeja/ kas
Subsana Pilli irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tretcha Gaddâ fawas
Walstibas/ darrija wiꞥſch Dsih-
es wiﬀeem faweeni Leeleen-Kun-
geem un faweeim Kalpeem/ tur
ija to Persern un Meedern
Barrence/ tee Augstneeki/ un to
Walstu Waldneeki winna Preek-
châ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka wiꞥſch parahditu ta-
pas Walstibas leelu Baggati-
u/ un fawas Augstibas dahrgu
Spohschunu/ dauds Deenas/
imts un astoxdesmits Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu fchihs Deenas bi-
n pagahjuschas/ darrija tas
Rehninsch wiﬀeem teem Laudim/
as Subsana Pilli atrasti tap-
e Dsihres/ tik labbi maseem ka
eleem/ feptix Deenas eekſch ta
Dahrfa Pagalinija pee ta Rehni-
a Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tur karrajahs baltas/ far-
anas un pasillas ( Gardines )
r dahrga Andekta un Purpu-
a Saitehm tadraba Gredsenôs/
ee Marmora Pihlaxeem peefee-
as/ tee Gulti bija no Selta un
Sudraba/ us weenu Grihdi no
rkana/ un balta/ un dseltena/
n mella Marmora.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Dsehreens tappe
ests selta Traukos/ un weens
raufs bija zittadi darrihts ka
as ohtrs/ un Rehninn Wihs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Dserchana notifke
pehz tahs Baufribas/ ka weens
ohtru pee tahs ne speestu/ jo ta
bij tas Rehninsch stipri paweh-
lês wiﬀeem fawa Namma Lee-
leem-Kungeem/ ka ikfurram fa-
wâ Wattâ bij buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir Wasti ta Rehninsinne
darrija Dsihres preekſch tahin
Seewahn/ kas eekſch ta Rehni-
na Namma/ kas tam Rehninsam
Aaswerufam peederreja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Septita Deenâ/ kad ta
Rehnina Sirđs no Wihna ee-
lihgtniojahs/ fazzija wiꞥſch us
Meumanu/ Bistu/ Arbonu/
Bigtu un Abagtu/ Setarn un
Karku/teem feptix Kambar-Jun-
kureem/ kas ta Rehnina Aaswe-
rusa Preekſcha kalpoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka teem bij to Rehninsin-
ni Wasti atwest preekſch ta Reh-
nina/ ar to Rehnina Krohni/ ka
wiꞥſch teem Laudim un Leeleem-
Kungeem winnas Skaistumu
rahditu/ jo ta bija skaista no
Waiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta Rehninsinne Wasti
leedsahs us ta Rehnina Wahrdn
nahkt/ zaur to Kambar-Junku-
ru Rohku. Tad apskaitahs tas
Rehninsch fohti/ un winna
Bahrsiba eededse eekſch winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Rehninsch
us teem Sudreem/ kas to Laiku
pratte/ (jo ta bij ta Rehnina Lee-
tahm ktuht preekſch wiﬀeem/ kas
to Likkumu un Teefu sapratte.)
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
